## Checklist

- [ ] I placed the assets are in the correct directories.
- [ ] I have the right to share these assets.
- [ ] I have added the artist/creator's name to `CREDITS.md` (or verified it is already there).
- [ ] If this asset requires a different license than CC BY 4.0, I have included a `LICENSE` file in the asset's folder.
